## Purpose of This Meeting
This meeting represents a **weekly Agile meeting conducted after
a sprint**. The goal was to:
- Synchronize team progress
- Demonstrate sprint outcomes
- Reflect on team process and identify improvements
  
The meeting followed a standard Agile structure:
1. Weekly Standup
2. End-of-Sprint Demonstration
3. Sprint Retrospective
